notes: HITRUST is a healthcare-focused information security and risk management organization. Publishes the HITRUST Common Security Framework (CSF), a control framework that consolidates HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST SP 800-53, PCI DSS, and other standards.

data.description: Comprehensive, certifiable, and scalable security and privacy controls framework consolidating multiple regulatory and standard requirements. Widely used by healthcare and adjacent industries for security certification (HITRUST CSF Certification).
